subject: fix(debug): fix duplicate entries, HMR accumulation, clear state, source colors
body:
Four bugs found via deep audit:

1. Duplicate entries on initial mount: setEntries(debugGetEntries()) +
   debugSubscribe replay doubled every entry. The subscription replays
   all current entries immediately, so the direct set was redundant.
   Removed it — subscription alone handles initial population.

2. Console interception HMR accumulation: console.error/warn patching
   had no HMR guard. Each Vite hot reload re-captured the already-patched
   methods as "originals," creating nested wrapper chains. After N reloads,
   each console.error produced N debug entries. Added __debugConsolePatched
   window flag matching the existing __debugLogListenersAttached pattern.

3. Clear button didn't reset reportText: if the visible textarea fallback
   was showing (clipboard failed), clicking Clear emptied entries but left
   the stale report text visible. Now resets reportText to null.

4. Missing import/export source colors: App.jsx uses debugAdd('import',
   ...) for file upload errors but SOURCE_COLORS had no entry, falling
   back to default gray. Added colors for both import and export sources.

Tags: debug, bugfix
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: patch
